name: agent_capability_computer_use_phase148c_single_app_text_visible_terminal
prompt: Run the Phase148C single_app_text controlled visible-terminal benchmark.
prompt_lines: Run the Phase148C single_app_text controlled benchmark. Use only the project terminal command below. It may open only the controlled Notepad test target and controlled project evidence files. Do not open login pages, payment pages, system settings, registry, installers, password managers, or private user documents.

You must call the terminal tool and run this verification command: $env:PYTHONPATH='..'; $env:LEARNING_AGENT_PHASE97_RUN_REAL_NOTEPAD_EDIT='1'; $env:LEARNING_AGENT_PHASE97_ENABLE_REAL_NOTEPAD_EDIT='1'; python -c "from learning_agent.computer_use_mcp_v2.windows_runtime.controlled_notepad_live_edit import main; raise SystemExit(main())"

Do not write the final answer early. Only after the terminal command prints PHASE97_CONTROLLED_NOTEPAD_LIVE_EDIT_OK, real_notepad_edit_executed=true, saved_file_verified=true, and real_desktop_touched=true, the final answer's last line must contain: PHASE148C_FRESH_BENCHMARK_READY PHASE148C_FRESH_BENCHMARK_OK family=single_app_text PHASE97_CONTROLLED_NOTEPAD_LIVE_EDIT_OK real_notepad_edit_executed=true notepad_process_verified=true target_rechecked_before_input=true target_rechecked_before_save=true saved_file_verified=true real_desktop_touched=true
